visual_intent: Horizontal timeline showing the evolution of data augmentation for NLP. Key milestones: SMOTE (2002) → EDA (2019) → MixText (2020) → GPT-3 Augmentation (2023) → LLM-based methods (2023-24: AugGPT, ImbLLM, SMOTExT) → Hybrid approaches (2025: This Thesis - Geometric Filtering). Each milestone has a brief description. The timeline shows progression from classical geometric methods to LLM-based methods to hybrid approaches.
planner_desc:
**Layout and Background:**
The figure is a horizontal, landscape-oriented timeline chart. The background is a clean, pure white (#FFFFFF) to ensure high contrast and a professional academic appearance. All text is in a crisp, modern sans-serif font (such as Arial or Roboto).

**Main Timeline Axis:**
Spanning horizontally across the vertical center of the image is a thick (approx. 4px) central axis line ending with a directional arrowhead pointing to the right, symbolizing the progression of time. To represent the conceptual evolution described in the text, the axis features a color gradient: it starts with a cool steel blue on the far left (representing "Geometric Methods"), transitions smoothly into a vibrant emerald green in the middle (representing "Linguistic/LLM Methods"), and finishes with a warm, bold golden-orange on the far right (representing "Hybrid Approaches"). 

**Thematic Groupings (Eras/Phases):**
Above the main timeline axis, three distinct, semi-transparent horizontal brackets or subtly colored pill-shaped background highlights span specific sections of the timeline to denote the three major eras:
1.  **Left Section (Blue highlight):** Labeled with bold blue text "Classical Era: Purely Geometric". Subtext in a smaller, lighter font reads "(Lacking linguistic quality)".
2.  **Middle Section (Green highlight):** Labeled with bold green text "LLM & Text Era: Purely Linguistic". Subtext reads "(Lacking geometric control)".
3.  **Right Section (Orange highlight):** Labeled with bold orange text "The Future: Hybrid Approaches". Subtext reads "(Combining both)".

**Milestone Nodes and Description Boxes:**
Along the central axis, circular nodes mark the temporal milestones. To avoid visual clutter, the description boxes connected to these nodes alternate their placement—some above the timeline, some below. Each box is a white rounded rectangle with a soft, subtle drop shadow (10% opacity black, 5px blur) and a 1.5px colored border matching its respective era.

1.  **Node 1 (Far Left, Blue):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid blue circle with a white outline.
    *   *Connection:* A thin (1.5px) solid blue line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Blue border. The header reads **"2002: SMOTE"** in bold. The body text says "Classical geometric interpolation." 
    *   *Icon:* A minimalist icon of a scatter plot with nodes connecting, located in the corner of the box.

2.  **Node 2 (Mid-Left, Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid green circle with a white outline.
    *   *Connection:* A thin green line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Green border. The header reads **"2019: EDA"** in bold. The body text says "Simple text transformations."
    *   *Icon:* A document icon with curved arrows indicating text swapping/synonyms.

3.  **Node 3 (Center, Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid green circle with a white outline.
    *   *Connection:* A thin green line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Green border. The header reads **"2020: MixText"** in bold. The body text says "Applies mixup in transformer hidden spaces."
    *   *Icon:* Overlapping transparent squares or neural network layers.

4.  **Node 4 (Mid-Right, Dark Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid dark green circle.
    *   *Connection:* A thin dark green line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Dark green border. The header reads **"2023: GPT-3 Augmentation"** in bold. The body text says "Achieves +12.7% accuracy."
    *   *Icon:* A glowing brain or AI spark icon.

5.  **Node 5 (Right, Dark Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid dark green circle.
    *   *Connection:* A thin dark green line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Dark green border. The header reads **"2023-24: LLM-based Methods"** in bold. The body text says "Includes AugGPT, ImbLLM, SMOTExT."
    *   *Icon:* Multiple chat bubbles with a robot face.

6.  **Node 6 (Far Right, Golden-Orange):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A prominent, slightly larger golden-orange star or glowing circle to emphasize the thesis contribution.
    *   *Connection:* A thicker (2px) golden-orange line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Golden-orange border with a slightly more pronounced drop shadow. The header reads **"2025: Hybrid Approaches (This Thesis)"** in bold text. The body text says "LLM generation paired with geometric quality control (Geometric Filtering)."
    *   *Icon:* A visual synthesis icon—interlocking puzzle pieces or a gear perfectly merged with a text document, symbolizing the combination of geometric structure and linguistic quality.
stylist_desc:
**Layout and Background:**
The figure is a horizontal, landscape-oriented timeline chart. The global background is a clean, pure white (`#FFFFFF`) to ensure high contrast and a professional academic appearance. The overall aesthetic adheres strictly to the "Soft Tech & Scientific Pastels" style, balancing clean modularity with clear narrative flow. All text utilizes a crisp, modern sans-serif font (such as Helvetica, Arial, or Roboto), with strict typographic hierarchy: bold for headers and regular for descriptive details.

**Main Timeline Axis:**
Spanning horizontally across the vertical center of the image is a solid, medium-thick (3px) central axis line ending with a directional arrowhead pointing to the right, symbolizing the progression of time. To visually represent the conceptual evolution, the axis features a smooth color gradient: transitioning from a cool, desaturated Pale Ice Blue on the far left, smoothly into a soft Mint Sage Green in the middle, and finishing with a warm, bold Golden-Orange on the far right.

**Thematic Groupings (Eras/Phases - The "Zone" Strategy):**
Above the main timeline axis, three distinct, soft pill-shaped background highlights with low opacity (10–15%) span specific sections of the timeline to organize the complexity into three major eras:
1.  **Left Section (Pale Blue / Ice Zone, approx. `#E6F3FF`):** Labeled with bold sans-serif text "Classical Era: Purely Geometric". Subtext in a smaller, regular font reads "(Lacking linguistic quality)".
2.  **Middle Section (Mint / Sage Zone, approx. `#E0F2F1`):** Labeled with bold sans-serif text "LLM & Text Era: Purely Linguistic". Subtext reads "(Lacking geometric control)".
3.  **Right Section (Cream / Warm Beige Zone, approx. `#F5F5DC`):** Labeled with bold sans-serif text "The Future: Hybrid Approaches". Subtext reads "(Combining both)".

**Milestone Nodes and Description Boxes:**
Along the central axis, circular nodes mark temporal milestones. To avoid visual clutter, the description boxes connected to these nodes alternate their placement—some above the timeline, some below. Following the "Softened Geometry" principle, each box is a white rounded rectangle (8px corner radius) with a soft, subtle drop shadow (10% opacity black, 5px blur) and a 1.5px solid colored border matching its respective era zone. Connections are made using clean, straight orthogonal or vertical solid lines.

1.  **Node 1 (Far Left, Blue):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid Ice Blue circle with a white outline.
    *   *Connection:* A thin (1.5px) solid blue line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Soft blue border. The header reads **"2002: SMOTE"** in bold. The body text says "Classical geometric interpolation."
    *   *Icon:* A minimalist, abstract flat 2D scatter plot with connecting graph nodes, reflecting a theoretical/geometric aesthetic.

2.  **Node 2 (Mid-Left, Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid Mint Green circle with a white outline.
    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Soft green border. The header reads **"2019: EDA"** in bold. The body text says "Simple text transformations."
    *   *Icon:* A crisp document icon with clean curved lines/arrows indicating text swapping or synonyms.

3.  **Node 3 (Center, Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid Mint Green circle with a white outline.
    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Soft green border. The header reads **"2020: MixText"** in bold. The body text says "Applies mixup in transformer hidden spaces."
    *   *Icon:* Overlapping flat flat squares/grids, visually implying attention maps or tensor matrices.

4.  **Node 4 (Mid-Right, Medium/Teal Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid medium-green circle.
    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Medium green border. The header reads **"2023: GPT-3 Augmentation"** in bold. The body text says "Achieves +12.7% accuracy."
    *   *Icon:* A stylized, minimalist AI spark or modern neural network representation.

5.  **Node 5 (Right, Medium/Teal Green):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid medium-green circle.
    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Medium green border. The header reads **"2023-24: LLM-based Methods"** in bold. The body text says "Includes AugGPT, ImbLLM, SMOTExT."
    *   *Icon:* Adopting the illustrative Agent/LLM domain style, this features clean UI-style chat bubbles layered with a friendly 2D vector robot face.

6.  **Node 6 (Far Right, Golden-Orange):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A prominent, slightly larger golden-orange star or glowing circle (utilizing higher saturation to highlight the final/active thesis contribution).
    *   *Connection:* A thicker (2px) solid golden-orange line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Golden-orange border with a slightly more pronounced drop shadow. The header reads **"2025: Hybrid Approaches (This Thesis)"** in bold. The body text says "LLM generation paired with geometric quality control (Geometric Filtering)."
    *   *Icon:* A cohesive visual synthesis icon—a precise computation gear perfectly merged with a text document, symbolizing the integration of rigid geometric structure with fluid linguistic quality.

critic_suggestions_0:
1. Thematic Grouping/Backgrounds (Critical): The soft background highlighting shapes meant to delineate the three eras ('Zones') are misaligned and improperly scaled. Currently, they appear as disconnected title backgrounds or localized vertical strips (like the green box behind MixText) rather than encompassing their respective timeline nodes. To visually group the eras, these background zones must act as broad, vertical columns that sit behind both the era titles and all corresponding timeline nodes and description boxes.
2. Zone Coverage: The Blue zone must encapsulate the 2002 node. The Green zone must be wide enough to horizontally encompass all four linguistic era nodes (2019, 2020, 2023, 2023-24). The Beige zone must cover the 2025 node.
3. Everything else (icons, text content, gradient axis, and box styles) accurately reflects the methodology section and is visually clear. The text properly mentions 'Geometric Filtering' for 2025 and the specific LLM methods for 2023-24 without hallucination.

Each box is a white rounded rectangle (8px corner radius) with a soft, subtle drop shadow (10% opacity black, 5px blur) and a 1.5px solid colored border matching its respective era zone. **Crucially, for every node, its text and its corresponding icon must be contained together within a single box.** Connections are clean, vertical solid lines.

    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid Ice Blue circle with a white outline.
    *   *Connection:* A thin (1.5px) solid blue line pointing down.

    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Soft green border. The header reads **"2019: EDA"** in bold. The body text says "Simple text transformations." Inside the box is an icon: A crisp document icon with curved lines/arrows indicating text swapping.

3.  **Node 3 (Center, Green Zone):**

    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Soft green border. The header reads **"2020: MixText"** in bold. The body text says "Applies mixup in transformer hidden spaces." Inside the box is an icon: Overlapping flat squares/grids, visually implying attention maps or matrices.

4.  **Node 4 (Mid-Right, Green Zone):**

    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis):* Medium green border. The header reads **"2023: GPT-3 Augmentation"** in bold. The body text says "Achieves +12.7% accuracy." Inside the box is an icon: A stylized, minimalist AI spark.

5.  **Node 5 (Right, Green Zone):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A solid medium-green circle.
    *   *Connection:* A thin solid green line pointing down.
    *   *Description Box (Below Axis):* Medium green border. The header reads **"2023-24: LLM-based Methods"** in bold. The body text says "Includes AugGPT, ImbLLM, SMOTExT." Inside the box is an icon: Clean UI-style chat bubbles layered with a friendly 2D vector robot face.

6.  **Node 6 (Far Right, Beige Zone):**
    *   *Axis Mark:* A prominent golden-orange glowing circle, labeled "2025" below the node.
    *   *Connection:* A thicker (2px) solid golden-orange line pointing up.
    *   *Description Box (Above Axis ONLY):* Golden-orange border with a slightly more pronounced drop shadow. There is only ONE box for this node. The header reads **"2025: Hybrid Approaches (This Thesis)"** in bold. The body text says "LLM generation paired with geometric quality control (Geometric Filtering)." (Ensure the text exactly matches, without any repeated words like "quality quality"). Inside this same box, integrated with the text, is an icon: A computation gear perfectly merged with a text document, symbolizing integration of geometry and linguistics. Ensure there is no separate box below the axis for this node.
critic_suggestions_1:
1. **Layout Consistency:** For the 2025 milestone in the 'Future' section, the text and the icon have been incorrectly split into two separate boxes (one above the axis and one below). They must be combined into a single description box located above the axis to maintain the alternating pattern and consistency with the other nodes. Remove the redundant box below the axis.
2. **Typographical Error:** The text in the 2025 box contains a typo: 'geometric quality quality control'. The word 'quality' is redundantly repeated. It should read 'geometric quality control'.
